title: Accepting Bitcoin for Ebook Sales: Everything You Need to Get Started — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: As a digital creator in Nigeria, you're facing a frustrating reality: PayPal has restricted your account, and you're unable to sell ebooks through conventional platforms. You're not alone. Thousands of creators worldwide are blocked by PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip due to geographic restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements. It's time to break free from these shackles and unlock your full earning potential. In this guide, we'll show you how to accept Bitcoin for ebook sales without relying on these restricted payment processors.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The beauty of using Bitcoin lies in its decentralized nature, allowing you to bypass the limitations imposed by PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip. With the rise of crypto-friendly payment processors like NOWPayments, you can now accept Bitcoin payments without needing a PayPal account. This method works because it allows you to connect directly with your customers, cutting out the middlemen and ensuring you receive 100% of your earnings. You're in control, and that's a powerful feeling.
What You Need Before You Start

To get started, you'll need a few essential tools. First, you'll require a digital product to sell, such as an ebook. Next, you'll need to set up a payment processor like NOWPayments, which supports over 300 coins, including Bitcoin. You'll also need to integrate a frontend wallet solution like Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), which enables buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. Finally, you'll need a platform to host your digital store, like Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine. With these tools in place, you're ready to start selling.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Now it's time to set up your payment and delivery pipeline. With NOWPayments, you can easily integrate Bitcoin payments into your digital store. Simply connect your NOWPayments account to your Unchained Commerce Shop Engine, and you'll be able to accept Bitcoin payments in seconds. To automate delivery, use the Unchained Commerce Shop Engine's automated delivery feature, which sends your digital product to customers as soon as payment is confirmed. This way, you can focus on growing your business while your customers enjoy instant access to their purchases.
Break free from PayPal's restrictions and start selling ebooks with Bitcoin.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

With your payment and delivery pipeline set up, it's time to go live and make your first sale. Create a digital store on Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine, add your ebook, and configure your payment settings. Use Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) to enable multi-chain QR code generation and live price feeds, allowing buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. Once you've uploaded your ebook, you're ready to accept payments and start selling. Promote your store to your audience, and watch as your earnings grow.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once your system is up and running, it's time to scale. Focus on growing your audience and promoting your store to increase your sales. With the automation features of Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine, you can easily manage orders, track analytics, and deliver your digital products to customers. Use this time to optimize your store, improve your marketing strategy, and explore new revenue streams. As your business grows, so will your earnings, and you'll be able to enjoy the freedom and flexibility that comes with selling digital products on your own terms.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Use NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine to create a crypto-only digital download store that attracts customers worldwide.

Explore our community and discover how to create a crypto-only digital download store that attracts customers from around the world. Your Action Checklist

To start selling ebooks without PayPal, follow these steps: Create a digital store on Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine and configure your payment settings. Set up a payment processor like NOWPayments, which supports over 300 coins, including Bitcoin. Integrate a frontend wallet solution like Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) to enable multi-chain QR code generation and live price feeds. Upload your ebook and configure automated delivery. Promote your store to your audience and watch as your earnings grow.
With Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), you can enable multi-chain QR code generation and live price feeds, making it easy for buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency.
